title: Flaky White Uruguayan Fish Skillet
description: A light and winey Uruguayan dish featuring almond flour and bonito flakes, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dairy-free friendly recipe is made in a wok for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the white fish fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Remove the fish from the wok and set aside.
Add the almond flour to the wok and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the bonito flakes, white wine, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the wok and stir to combine.
Return the fish to the wok and spoon some of the sauce over the top of each fillet.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with additional bonito flakes if desired.
